case_title: MOGOS, GHIRMAY VS PAN EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY MOGOS, GHIRMAY AS TO DEFENDANT PAN EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-29-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOGOS, GHIRMAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PAN EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC. $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $39.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,739.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PAN EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PAN EXPRESS TRAVEL, INC.
